big_problem: Three Bureau tabs still hide behind HIDDEN_BUREAU_SLUGS while APIs return live league rows.
epic: League L5 — Unhide remaining Bureau tabs with screenshot-ready renderers
slice_title: Schedule tab unhidden with Octo SOS renderer
parity_ref: League L5 — hidden Bureau renderers or watermarked export
acceptance_ref: FACTORY-DOD — Bureau tab visible, web build green
acceptance_commands: node -e "const {HIDDEN_BUREAU_SLUGS}=require('./apps/web/lib/bureau-features.ts');" 2>/dev/null || grep -q 'new Set\(\[\]\)' apps/web/lib/bureau-features.ts || ! grep -q strength-of-schedule apps/web/lib/bureau-features.ts | head -1; test $(grep -c strength-of-schedule apps/web/lib/bureau-features.ts) -ge 1
